headline: A 5-week course and a guaranteed job: Meta commits $115 million to solve the skilled-trades shortage stalling its AI buildout
summary: The investment is part of the company’s larger plan to spend $600 billion on its U.S. data center buildout by 2028.

headline: Zacks.com featured highlights include HEICO, Dillard's and CBRE

headline: CBRE Cuts MGM Resorts (MGM) to Hold as People Inc. Pursues Buyout Proposal
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $2.55 billion, MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 3, CBRE downgraded MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) to Hold from Buy. It also set a $50 price target on the stock. On June 1, CNBC reported that Barry Diller’s People Inc. […]
